title: Daanbantayan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Daanbantayan with a Z-Score of +4.09. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Daanbantayan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 65%, and the wind speed is 4.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, posing a threat to the population.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
